name: Jalapeño Popper Pull-Apart Bread

ingredients.item: crusty loaf of bread, such as

method: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the top of the loaf long ways and then crossways, taking
care not to cut through the loaf.
Gently open the bread slices and put cream cheese within,
ensuring it seeps deep into the crevices. Then spread both kinds
of cheese over the bread, pressing them into the gaps. Half of
the jalapenos should be tucked into slices, and the remainder
should be used to top the bread.
Transfer the bread to a baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes or
until the cheese has melted. Serve right away.
